title: Initialization of parameter of instance with pattern

features.name: unpacked array parameter with pattern-based instantiation override
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation that overrides an unpacked array parameter using the pattern syntax .P('{...}) where the parameter type is an unpacked integer array

features.name: unpacked array parameter element access
features.description: Code should include an assignment that accesses an element of an unpacked array parameter using indexed access P[2]
features.snippet:
parameter int P [5];
assign x = P[2];

features.name: unpacked array parameter default value comparison
features.description: Code should include two variants: one where an unpacked array parameter is assigned via pattern at instantiation, and another where the same unpacked array is assigned as a default value of the parameter declaration
